chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Cr. B.A. No.S- 1423 of 2019 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 07.09.2020 Mr. Jehanzeb Ali Dahri, Advocate for applicant. Father of the applicant/accused namely Gul Muhammad s/o Muhammad Bachal is present in person alongwith surety of the applicant/accused. Ms. Rameshan Oad, A.P.G. Sindh alongwith SIP Malik Jawed Iqbal SHO P.S B-Section Latifabad, Hyderabad. = It is informed by learned A.P.G that applicant/accused Bachal Mallah S/o Gul Muhammad has been murdered during commission of alleged dacoity and such F.I.R. was lodged in this regard. In this respect, SIP/SHO P.S B-Section Latifabad present files his report alongwith copy of F.I.R. bearing Crime No.101/2020, registered at Police Station B-Section Latifabad, Hyderabad, under sections 397, 302, 34 PPC as well as post-mortem report of deceased accused, taken on record. Perusal of the same reveals that applicant/accused Bachal Mallah has been murdered during the alleged incident of aforementioned F.I.R. Father of the applicant/accused namely Gul Muhammad present in Court, also affirms this fact. Under these circumstances, captioned bail application has become infructuous and the same is disposed of accordingly. However, the surety furnished on behalf of the applicant/accused stands discharged. Office is directed to return the same to surety after proper verification and identification. A copy of this order be sent immediately to the trial Court for information. JUDGE S
